name: Medacare Transportation Inc
service_types: school transportation (mentioned as a service line)
districts_or_customers: Hamilton, Butler, Warren, and Clermont counties (Greater Cincinnati); DODD, VA, nursing homes, adult day care, dialysis facilities
recent_news: Company website indicates growth from start-up in 1994 to ~120 employees serving 4 SW Ohio counties; no M&A signal found.
fit_notes: Primarily NEMT/wheelchair-van operator with only a peripheral school-transport line; not a yellow-bus contractor. Limited fit as a Summit tuck-in unless Summit is building a SPED/alt-transport NEMT footprint in SW Ohio.

name: Lexington Limousine
districts_or_customers: Westport, CT / Fairfield County area; no school district contracts confirmed
recent_news: No public news, M&A activity, or web presence confirmed; lexingtonlimo.net did not surface verifiable detail in search.
fit_notes: Appears to be a 3-person limousine operator, not a yellow-bus/SPED contractor. Not a credible Summit tuck-in target.

name: Flexible Moves Transportation
districts_or_customers: Rural Guilford, NE Davidson, N Randolph, W Alamance counties (Piedmont Triad, NC); no school district contracts identified
recent_news: BBB-accredited March 2025; company website lists founding 2017 (BBB notes 2-year operation starting 10/2023 — suggesting recent re-registration). No M&A activity.
fit_notes: Pure NEMT/wheelchair-van micro-operator with no school-bus or SPED routes. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: CTC Transportation LLC
districts_or_customers: Memphis/Shelby County, TN; serves Medicaid/Medicare NEMT clients (no school-district contract evidence)
recent_news: NPI 1902363468 registered as Non-Emergency Medical Transport (VAN); no news, no M&A.
fit_notes: Single-van NEMT operator, not a school-bus contractor. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: H & M Enterprise LTD
districts_or_customers: Winston-Salem / Forsyth County, NC; registered SAM.gov government vendor (federal contracting capable); minority/small/disadvantaged business cert; no school district contract evidence
recent_news: Active SAM.gov registration, BBB profile and NPI 1619647021 active; no M&A signal.
fit_notes: Small minority-owned wheelchair/NEMT operator; designation as 'special needs transportation' is medical, not SPED yellow-bus. Limited fit as a Summit tuck-in; potentially relevant only for an alt-transport/SPED van-fleet rollup in Piedmont NC.
